sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64955" key="mantia/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαντῐ-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in Cyprus, <sense id="n64955.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">president of a college of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάντεις</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">LW</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2795</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαντῐ´-αρχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Myres <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cesnola Collection</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1909</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
